channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Escape from Tarkov Players Get Insane Promo Code to Start Icebreaker
item.content:encoded:
Battlestate Games has just released the 1.0.5.0 update in Escape from Tarkov, bringing Icebreaker to the game and implementing a new story chapter for all players. It’s a PvE experience, but it adds a massive new map, fresh ways to play, and a new boss, The Wedge. He has a diehard team of elite followers that will make your life a living hell, guaranteed.

To usher in the new update and bestow gifts upon fans everywhere, Battlestate Games put in place a fresh promo code that offers some incredible rewards.

The new promo code in Escape from Tarkov is BACKTORAID, and it’s well worth activating, as it nets you a sizeable bounty of loot.

For redeeming the code, you’ll get:

  • 1 x Model 1 rifle
  • 1 x Saiga 12K FA shotgun
  • 1 x Medicine Case
  • 1 x Weapons Case
  • 1 x Redut-M armor (Tier 5)
  • 1 x Gladiator-S armor (Tier 5)
  • 2 x AirFrame helmet
  • 1 x AirFrame Chops
  • 2 x Gen M3 magazines
  • 1 x MD Arms Saiga drum
  • 1 x FC1 SM mount
  • 1 x R1X optic
  • 1 x M855A1 x100
  • Flechette shells x 50

It’s one of the most lucrative and generous promo codes we’ve seen hit Escape from Tarkov in a while, so be sure to activate it in the game’s launcher or via the website.

Icebreaker is now live in Escape from Tarkov, and players are busying themselves with finding out exactly how to reach the map, as it’s not immediately obvious. When you install the 1.0.5.0 update, you’ll notice that nothing has really changed…

Let us know on the Insider Gaming Discord server if you’ve managed to find the way to Icebreaker.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news about the Destiny 3 petition

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Vatira Bests M0nkey M00n in RLCS Paris Major Grand Final to Ignite GOAT Debate
item.content:encoded:
Karmine Corp defeated Twisted Minds 4-1 in front of a ravenous home crowd to win the Rocket League Championship (RLCS) 2026 Paris Major.

The victory meant Axel ‘Vatira’ Touret secured a record fourth Major win in the open era, securing the win and tournament MVP with victory over Evan ‘M0nkey M00n’ Rogez.

Karmine Corp defeat Twisted Minds in RLCS Paris Major Grand Finals

Karmine Corp defeated Twisted Minds 4-2, 1-0, 0-3, 2-1, 2-1 to claim their second title of the year after their RLCS 2026 Kick-Off Weekend victory, giving the roster their second Major in four attempts.

The victory also saw Alexandre ‘Extra’ Paoli become the first former player to win a Rocket League Major as coach.

The duo of Vatira and Tristan ‘Atow.’ Soyez showed why they have been labelled as the best duo in Rocket League, as the pair combined to grind out the series against a spirited but sometimes uncoordinated Twisted Minds.

Twisted Minds will be bitterly disappointed with the second-place finish, none more so than Mohammed ‘trk511’ Alotaibi, who suffered his fifth big-event Grand Final defeat, after losing the RLCS 2025 World Championship Grand Final to NRG last September.

Still, the run to the finals was an unforgettable one for Twisted Minds after a remarkable lower bracket run, which saw the team eliminate Gentle Mates, amongst others.

After the loss, Twisted Minds’ coach Kais ‘Sadjunior’ Zehri took responsibility for the Grand Final defeat, remarking that his team would be back.

GOAT debate heats up after fourth Vatira Major

Vatira is amassing a legendary career, becoming the first player to win two, then three, and now four Majors in the open era.

With this victory coming against M0nkey M00n, the victory has sparked discussion on whether the 20-year-old Frenchman should be part of the GOAT debate.

Some have argued that the Frenchman is already up there with GOATs M0nkey M00n, Pierre ‘Turbopolsa’ Silfver, and Alexandre ‘Kaydop’ Courant due to the level of his play.

The Frenchman now has four majors, an Esports World Cup victory, and a FIFAe win representing an admittedly stacked French lineup.

Still, there is one big omission from that list, and that is a World Championship, where Vatira’s best placement was a semi-final exit in 2025, 2024, and 2022-23.

To truly be up there with the greatest, the Frenchman must deliver on Rocket League’s biggest stage, starting with the RLCS World Championship 2026, hosted at Fort Worth.

Can a player be a GOAT contender without winning Worlds? Let us know on our Discord Server.
For other news, see the details of Insider Gaming’s Showcase!

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/karmine-corp-rlcs-paris-major-vatira/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: ESL Announces IEM Beijing 2026: Set to be Biggest IEM Event in Asia
item.content:encoded:
ESL has announced that the Intel Extreme Masters will return to Beijing in November for the 16-team IEM Beijing 2026, the first IEM Beijing since 2019.

IEM Beijing 2026 will take place from November 2 to November 8, marking a move away from IEM Chengdu, which hosted IEM events in 2024 and 2025.

IEM Beijing 2026 details: Prize pool, 360 Stage & a record-breaking expected audience

Organized in partnership with the Beijing Esports Industry Development Association as a part of the ‘Beijing Esports’ initiative, the tournament will take place at the Bloomage Biotech·Biohyalux ECM Arena in Wukesong, Haidian District.

Marking its first return to Beijing since 2019, the event will see 16 of the world’s best Counter-Strike 2 teams compete for the IEM Beijing trophy and a total prize pool of $1,250,000.

The event will be the third ESL event of ESL Grand Slam Season VII, following IEM Atlanta and the upcoming ESL Pro League Season 24 in Katowice in October. Vitality secured the previous ESL Grand Slam at IEM Rio 2026.

For the first time since the IEM Rio Major 2022, an ESL event will feature a 360-degree stage design. With an expected audience of over 45,000 fans, the event is set to become the largest standalone IEM event ever held in Asia to date.

Building on the success of the live-audience group stage at IEM Chengdu 2025, IEM Beijing will once again welcome fans throughout all six tournament days, offering more opportunities to experience world-class Counter-Strike action live from the arena.

In addition to three days of live group stage matches and playoffs, fans can look forward to other activities such as signing sessions with all participating teams and a wide range of on-site activities across all competition days.

ESL and Beijing Esports Industry Development Association collaboration announced

As part of the announcement, ESL released the following statement from Director of Counter-Strike 2 Esports at ESL FACEIT Group, Marc Winther, who shared:

“Over the past years, we’ve experienced the incredible passion and energy of Chinese fans firsthand. With IEM Beijing 2026, we’re excited to take things to the next level through a 360-degree stage design and a range of fan activations, while further deepening our commitment to the region.

Winther continued, “Together with the Beijing Esports Industry Development Association, we look forward to welcoming IEM’s largest live audience in Asia to date and creating new opportunities for fans and partners.”

As part of the collaboration between ESL FACEIT Group and the Beijing Esports Industry Development Association, both parties have expressed a shared commitment to further deepen their cooperation within the esports ecosystem, working together to develop diverse initiatives to unlock the industry’s full potential locally.

Are you happy to see IEM back in Beijing? Let us know on our Discord Server.
For other news, see the details of Insider Gaming’s Showcase!

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson

MOBILE APP

item.title: Seventh Grand Finals Defeat in a Row Pours Cold Water on Falcons Major Hype
item.content:encoded:
Team Falcons suffered their first true failure under the leadership of Finn ‘karrigan’ Andersen, suffering a damaging 1-3 Grand Final defeat to Legacy at the CS Asia Championships 2026.

The loss served to deflate expectations of Falcons going into the IEM Cologne 2026 Major, with T-sides especially looking severely undercooked at this early stage of the roster.

Legacy retain the CS Asia Championships with win over Falcons

Despite the relatively new nature of the Falcons lineup, the roster came into the event as the clear favourites owing to their combination of ranking, star power, and form after a PGL Astana Grand Finals berth.

Legacy, however, also had a strong form to draw from, finishing third at IEM Atlanta, in an albeit weaker field besides Vitality and eventual champions NAVI.

Legacy had defeated NAVI in the group stages then, but could not muster a challenge for Falcons in the Group Stage of CAC, losing 13-7, 13-9 in a relatively simple series for Team Falcons.

Legacy instantly showed a superior face in the Grand Final, just falling short on Nuke due to an excellent Maksim ‘kyousuke’ Lukin performance that saved Falcons from danger.

On Ancient, Legacy raced to a 9-3 CT half, restricting Falcons to only three T-sides rounds, before Falcons won six of the first seven rounds of their own CT half.

A Nikola ‘NiKo’ Kovač blunder gave Legacy their 11th round, before strong impact from event MVP Bruno ‘latto’ Rebelatto delivered Legacy Ancient.

On Mirage, Legacy kept up their momentum as Eduardo ‘dumau’ Wolkmer did what he does best, delivering strong entries on the T-side before Falcons once again fell flat on the T-side, giving Legacy a 13-6 victory on the map.

On Dust 2, the story was no different as Legacy raced to a 6-0 CT-side start, ultimately only giving up three rounds on the half before easily converting the map 13-6 and retaining the CS Asia Championships after their 2025 victory.

As for Falcons, the roster managed only eight T-sided rounds in the final three maps against Legacy, decisively showing that the T-side system karrigan is attempting to embed is not ready to challenge for big titles.

While the roster is still early in its time together, commentators and analysts had hopes that the roster would be ready to challenge Vitality for the IEM Cologne 2026 Major, due to the latent firepower in the roster; however, after defeat to Legacy at Shanghai, fans may have to accept a more reasonable timeframe.

Running themes of Falcons’ failure

The loss is not only damaging in and of itself, but also damaging for how it reinforces several patterns that have emerged in Falcons’ failures over the last 18 months.

The Grand Final defeat is not only the seventh Grand Final defeat in a row for the organization, but the eighth in a row for 21-year-old AWPer Ilya ‘m0NESY’ Osipov after he lost his last Grand Final with G2, ironically against Falcons at PGL Bucharest.

The Russian has, at times, underperformed in Grand Finals, though he was certainly not the primary issue individually in Falcons’ failure against Legacy.

Instead, the main culprit is once again Nikola ‘NiKo’ Kovač, who has consistently underperformed when the lights have shone brightest for Falcons.

In the three map losses of the Grand Final, NiKo delivered a 0.93 hLTV rating on Ancient, a 0.54 rating on Mirage, and a 0.74 rating on Dust 2.

In the end, that left far too much emphasis on their young star Maksim ‘kyousuke’ Lukin, who delivered a whopping 1.41 rating in the Grand Final to no avail.

NiKo’s Grand Final issue cannot be ignored anymore, representing a huge deflation from his usual level, with pressure visible in certain moments, like the Ancient flank fumble that turned the series indelibly in Legacy’s favour.

Counter-Strike broadcast analyst Alex ‘Mauisnake’ Ellenberg also believes that karrigan’s individual level also cannot be ignored any longer.

karrigan delivered only a 0.59 rating over the course of the Grand Final, giving up 14 opening kills in return for only three, for an overall 29/59/23 KDA record.

Debates over karrigan’s ability to frag have existed for a decade, with the Danish IGL’s performance usually correlating to his ability to focus on his own game, rather than micromanaging the team.

In the early days of this roster, it can be argued that karrigan is suffering from implementing his system, but it can be equally argued that the level being shown is unsustainable at the top level of Counter-Strike, even with Falcons outstanding firepower elsewhere.

Worst of all, karrigan is on his own Grand Finals loss streak, which includes CAC, PGL Astana, HLC Belgrade Pro, the StarLadder Budapest Major, and the Perfect World Shanghai Major Grand Finals.

For the first time since joining, the failure to beat Legacy in the CAC 2026 Grand Final has put the roster under real scrutiny.

Is the loss something to worry about for Falcons or just a blip in the road? Let us know on our Discord Server.
For other news, see the details of Insider Gaming’s Showcase!

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Destiny 3 Petition Shatters Marathon’s Peak Player Count
item.content:encoded:
In a bid to try and save the Destiny franchise, fans have rallied behind a petition for Bungie to begin development on Destiny 3, and it’s already accrued more signatures than Marathon‘s peak player count.

This is especially damning, since it’s been revealed that Destiny 2 is no longer receiving any more updates, and instead, it seems like Bungie is moving on to prioritise the furtherment of Marathon instead, despite its underwhelming fan reception.

Fans Are Desperate For Destiny 3

At the time of writing, the petition urging Sony to greenlight Destiny 3 has surpassed 170,000 signatures, with the numbers continuing to climb.

According to Paul Tassi and sources at Bungie, Marathon’s player count split appears to sit at roughly 2:1 between Steam and console users. While exact figures across all platforms remain unclear, that metric would indicate that Marathon likely peaked somewhere between 130,000 and 150,000 players during its opening week.

That makes the Destiny 3 movement all the more notable, as it directly clashes with Bungie’s apparent strategy of investing more time and resources into Marathon rather than the future of Destiny. Reports of further layoffs at Bungie have only added to concerns surrounding the franchise’s future, making the prospect of Destiny 3 feel increasingly distant.

Still, that hasn’t stopped the community from holding onto hope. With Destiny 2’s final update, Monument of Triumph, arriving on June 9, fans are encouraging players to return to the game in large numbers in an effort to show Sony that there is still a massive audience invested in the franchise.

Unfortunately for fans, the situation still comes down to finances. Despite the success of the Destiny 2 expansion The Final Shape, which many will now consider as the ‘true ending’ to Destiny, the release was still followed by major layoffs at Bungie. With Bungie decreasing in value as a studio, it seems unlikely Sony is willing to invest in Destiny 3 anytime soon.

If you’re hoping to see Destiny 3 enter development, it’d serve you well to sign the petition and log in to the game on June 9 along with the thousands of others who plan to do so. It’s as long a shot as they get, but for a franchise like Destiny, it can’t go down without a fight.

What do you make of the Destiny situation? Do you think Bungie are making a mistake prioritising Marathon over Destiny? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server, and don’t forget to tune into the Insider Gaming Showcase on May 28!

For more gaming news, read about the reveal of Unreal Engine 6, as well as what to expect from the upcoming Sony State of Play.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

MOBILE APP

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Complete 007 First Light Trophy List—How To Get All Achievements & Trophies
item.content:encoded:
Everyone begins somewhere, and it’s almost time to see how James Bond became the legendary spy we all know him as in 007 First Light. It’s bound to be a riveting adventure, and you’ll be happy to know that there’s a solid trophy list to boot.

It’s been a long time since we’ve had a James Bond video game, and out of all the development teams out there, IO Interactive might just be the perfect team to tackle the job. Their experience with Hitman makes them masters in the art of spycraft, and you’ll need to be just as savvy if you want that Platinum trophy.

How Many Achievements & Trophies In 007 First Light?

There are 38 trophies to earn on PlayStation, with 37 achievements across Xbox and Steam, thanks to the lack of the ever-coveted Platinum.

Despite the recent changes to Xbox achievements, it’s still widely regarded that PlayStation has the edge when it comes to trophy-hunting, with everyone always chasing the final Platinum trophy to mark 100% completion.

  • More Insider Gaming: Is 007 First Light Canon In James Bond? 007 First Light Vs Bond Movies, Explained

With 38 trophies on the cards for 007 First Light, it shouldn’t be the most demanding of tasks, but avid trophy-hunters know it’s not about the number of trophies, but what it takes to earn them. With that in mind, it’s about time we dive into the list itself.

All 007 First Light Trophies & Achievements

007 First Light’s trophy list features 18 hidden achievements that contain story spoilers for the campaign. To give you a chance at avoiding spoilers, I’ve split the trophy list into two.

This first list will feature the non-spoiler trophies, and the list is overall fairly easy. You’ll be doing the usual completionist tasks like hunting down collectables and using certain moves during combat. The trophy titles are also an homage to the vast and intricate lore of the 007 franchise.

Here are the non-hidden trophies for 007 First Light:

This is your final spoiler warning!

If you want to go into the game blind, you’ll earn each of these trophies simply by completing the campaign, so only read these if you want some insight into the missions before playing.

  • More Insider Gaming: How Long Is 007 First Light? Game Length & Total Hours, Explained

Without further ado, here’s every hidden trophy for 007 First Light:

What do you make of the 007 First Light trophy list? Looks like an easy platinum, right? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more 007 First Light content, check out the following:

  • 007 First Light Cast Revealed—All Voice Actors, Explained
  • Does 007 First Light Have Multiplayer Or Co-Op?
  • 007 First Light Sequel Depends On Public Reception

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For May 25, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, May 22, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Type of shop
  • Hint 2: Place you hand in prescriptions
  • Hint 3: Go here to buy medicine

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Bookstore
  • Cosmetic
  • Druggist
  • Prescription
  • Grocery
  • Store
  • Supermarket
  • Walgreen
  • Pharmacy

Today’s Contexto Answer For May 22, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Drugstore

A Drugstore is a shop that sells medicines and other goods.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on May 26.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Escape from Tarkov 1.5 Patch Notes—Full ICEBREAKER Update Explained
item.content:encoded:
Battlestate Games has unveiled the ICEBREAKER update in Escape from Tarkov, which brings the 1.0.5 patch to the game after weeks of teasers. This update introduces a new PvE experience that takes place away from Tarkov’s core region, on a nuclear-powered icebreaker ship that’s trapped inside Tarkov’s blockade ring.

This PvE map facilitates both solo and team-based gameplay, with a maximum squad restriction of three players, and it also adds a new boss, fresh weapons, ways to play, and much more. Check out the full patch notes below.

Escape from Tarkov ICEBREAKER is HERE

In a post breaking down the full patch notes for Escape from Tarkov’s 1.0.5 update, Battlestate Games opened things up with this intro paragraph:

How did the Paradigm Shipping icebreaker end up trapped inside Tarkov’s blockade ring? What happened to its crew? Who is behind it all? You’ll uncover the answers by completing a new story chapter during an expedition focused on exploration and PvE gameplay. And if answers alone are not enough, the loot will make it worth your while.

Icebreaker is a separate location for 1-3 players, available in all game modes. There, you will face AI enemies either solo or as part of a group. You will not be matched with random players on Icebreaker.

Earlier this month, BSG held a Tarkov TV episode that uncovered some of the most important new features coming to the game, and some of those have been added with this update. That includes the new UI mechanic that helps you understand when you’re nearing a quest objective or a specific item you need for a mission.

It was also confirmed that ‘several’ new streamer items have been added to the game, but we don’t know what they are just yet. This has always been a point of contention amongst players, though.

The fixes in the 1.0.5 patch are relatively slim, as the core of this update revolves around the Icebreaker map and experience, but here they are:

  • Fixed a cause of memory leaks related to the audio system in certain cases
  • Optimized the animation system to reduce CPU usage
  • Fixed an issue where the limb selection interface for healing could disappear in certain situations
  • Fixed visual artifacts when using x2 and x4 resampling while interacting with Traders and the Hideout in certain cases
  • Fixed the cause of error 228 that could occur when removing an expiring water filter from the Water Collector zone in the Hideout
  • Fixed several visual issues related to geometry and colliders across locations
  • Fixed a cause of severe client performance drops when dragging ammo from the inventory over a full magazine in the search window
  • Fixed an issue where kills with Saiga-12K 12ga automatic shotgun (Redline) did not count towards progression of the tasks “Silent Caliber” and “Punisher p.4”
  • Fixed the incorrect compass behavior after exiting the BTR
  • Number of minor fixes to various aspects of the game.

Battlestate Games is keeping quiet about the content contained in ICEBREAKER, leaving it up to players to determine what it is and how it can be beaten, which is typical for Escape from Tarkov.

Are you excited about today’s Escape from Tarkov update? Let us know your thoughts on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that Star Citizen has raised $1 billion

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

item.title: NYT Strands #812 Hints and Answers for Today, May 24, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Strands is a daily word search puzzle game from The New York Times. It is a relatively new game, launched in 2024, in which players seek a common theme among words in a 6×8 letter grid.

Whether it’s your first time playing or you’re a Strands veteran, today’s tips and strategies can help you find words faster. So, if you’ve found yourself stuck with today’s Strands, don’t worry, below you’ll find some helpful hints and even the answers for Strands Game #812 for Saturday, May 24, 2026

To play today’s Strands, head to the game’s website.

IMPORTANT: The following information includes spoilers on today’s edition of Strands. If you don’t want the answer given to you, stop scrolling.

How To Play Strands

Strands is a daily word search that challenges you to find words with a common theme. There’s also a Spanagram that reveals the deeper theme behind the words.

  • Words that are three letters or fewer do not count.
  • Words that reveal the correct theme appear in blue.
  • The Spanagram turns yellow when found.
  • Finding three words that don’t fit the theme will reveal a hint to help you find the proper words.

The goal is to string together as many words as possible. Every letter on the grid gets used! Daily puzzles keep players coming back for more, making it a fun brain exercise and a popular online trend.

Strands can only be played on the New York Times website or on the NYT Games app.

Strands Hints For Today, May 24, 2026

The Strands’ answers to the theme of Game #812 are all terms related to items that unwind.

General Strands Hints For May 24

Without giving today’s Strands answers completely away, here are a few helpful hints for today to get you started:

  • Hint 1: A way to access ancient texts, often rolled up and discovered by adventurers.
  • Hint 2: An anagram of “pools”.
  • Hint 3: When a video is posted to Instagram in portrait orientation, it is branded this.

Use these clues to narrow down your searches and increase your chances of solving Strands #812 for May 24, 2026.

Words to Help You Find Strand Hints for May 24, 2026

If you want help getting started without having today’s Strands answer given to you, there are a few starter words worth trying that will help you unlock some in-game hints. A few starter words that may help are:

  • SPIT
  • SPIN
  • SPITE
  • SPINE
  • PINE

Today’s Strands Answer For Game #812 On May 24, 2026

If you’ve tried everything, including using the above hints, and are still stuck, you can find the answers to today’s Strands below. Check out the answers for past puzzles here.

  • SCROLL
  • SPOOL
  • SPINDLE
  • REEL
  • COIL
  • WINCH
  • SPANAGRAM: TRYTOUNWIND

If you solved today’s Strands without our answers, congratulations! If not, take note of the best tips above for tomorrow’s puzzle, and check back daily for more hints.

When Is The Next Strands Game After #812?

All New York Times games are updated daily at 12 am or Midnight in your respective time zone. Information about the next game is often available in the hours leading up to it, giving players a heads-up. The game on May 25 will be Strands Game #813.

What Is Strands?

Strands is a daily word search puzzle game created by The New York Times. Launched in 2024, Strands challenges players to discover a common theme among words in a 6×8 letter grid. The game’s original concept was developed by Juliette Seive, a research director on The New York Times Games team, with the aim of replicating Wordle’s success. Tracy Bennett has served as the puzzle editor for Strands, overseeing the creation and curation of daily puzzles since the publication’s launch.

For even more Insider Gaming delivered straight to your inbox, sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/nyt-strands-812-hints-and-answers-for-today-may-24-2026/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Star Citizen Surpasses $1 Billion in Crowdfunding Support
item.content:encoded:
Star Citizen, the MMO from Cloud Imperium Games, has reached $1 billion in funding. This comes over a decade after the game was first announced in 2012.

The game reached over $2 million in an initial Kickstarter campaign, and the developers continue to crowdfund, having now surpassed $1 billion. However, the game was originally targeting a 2014 release, and nearly 12 years later, it still doesn’t have a solid release date, even though they’re targeting a hopeful 2026 launch.

Star Citizen Creator Compares MMO Hopes to World of Warcraft

In an interview with Variety, Chris Roberts, the game’s designer, expressed how much fan support means to him. He highlighted that this support has been crucial in keeping the project moving forward. He pointed out that a major game publisher or private equity funding would not have allowed for the patience and time necessary for the creative process they are pursuing. He is also targeting a game with a similar trajectory to World of Warcraft, which has cultivated communities that have persisted for decades.

“People just want to see the biggest, best world possible, and they love the idea of the dream. And as we’re going along and they see more of it, it reinforces itself, basically. I fully believe that we’ve still got a long time, even after we’ve got what we call 1.0 out, and we’re not considering an alpha anymore, that we’ll be adding and building on the universe and the world, and it will be a place for people to adventure together, meet up together, and have fun together. Not too different than, say, ‘World of Warcraft,’ which has been going on for 20-plus years after it released.”

In addition to the multiplayer aspect of the game, there’s also Squadron 42. Squadron 42 is a cinematic single-player experience set in the Star Citizen universe, and according to the official website, it’s targeting a 2026 release. Learn more about Star Citizen by checking out the official website here.

Insider Gaming will continue to track the progression of this game and share any updates as they become available. How do you feel about Star Citizen? Are you excited to play the fully released game? Is this the first you’ve heard of it? Sound off about this story and all others in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP
